what_it_does: A structured interpretive ledger record describing the GUIDE.md analysis methodology for ingested deck folders, including golden rules, a seven-step workflow, pixel-sampling recipes, diff/graduation discipline, folder order, and open questions.
observations: Records an interpretive summary of the GUIDE.md analysis methodology for ingested deck folders.
States four golden rules: analysis changes nothing in the system, content-agnostic noun translation, ratios not pixels, and subtlety as signal.
Outlines a seven-step workflow from ingestion through sampling, templating, diffing, gap logging, and synthesis.
Specifies pixel-sampling recipes: an 11x11 averaging window with spread<10 as trustworthy, hue-clustering chromatic pixels by 12 degrees, and row/column scans for margins as percentages.
Uses a confirm/new/generalise/contradict vocabulary for diffs against tokens and prior folders, treating contradictions as high-signal.
Requires a >=2-folder confirmation bar before any finding graduates into the system.
Prescribes a graduation order: recalibrate tokens, then pattern primitives, components, and the 13 template archetypes, with deprecate-not-rename.
Includes a recommended folder order and a watch-for set of open cross-folder questions.
Acknowledges that typeface identification depends on letterform judgement or user confirmation.
Notes that sampling snippets live in a prior pitch-deck session rather than as reusable repo code.
standouts: The >=2-folder confirmation gate as the central anti-overfitting discipline.
'Subtlety is the signal' with measured tolerances (spread<10 = trustworthy flat).
Contradictions prioritised as the highest-signal output because they expose hidden dialects.
Hue-clustering as a method to extract colour ramps from thin elements without guessing coordinates.
conventions: Content-agnostic grammar capture (record roles, not domain subjects).
Ratio-relative measurement (% of frame, type-step ratios) for surface independence.
Evidence-grounded sampling with stated tolerances instead of eyeball estimates.
Confirm/new/generalise/contradict diff tagging against tokens and prior folders.
Graduation discipline: confirmed-across-2-folders gate and deprecate-not-rename.
Template-driven consistency via a 9-level template copied per analysis.
concerns: References sibling files (_TEMPLATE.md, pitch-deck.md, SYSTEM-GAPS.md, PROGRESS.md) whose presence is not confirmed from this file.
Typeface identification relies on letterform judgement or user confirmation, leaving a gap in the otherwise measured protocol.
Sampling snippets are described as living in a prior session's history rather than as reusable code in the repo.
The >=2-folder graduation bar is mentioned, but the file also notes other analyses routed single-folder findings to graduation, creating an unresolved tension.
notes: A neutral, file-local interpretive ledger entry that captures the GUIDE.md analysis protocol, its anti-overfitting graduation gate, and the open questions it leaves behind.
questions: Where is _TEMPLATE.md and what are the exact nine levels it prescribes?
Are the sampling/measuring snippets captured anywhere reusable, or only in a prior session's history?
How is the >=2-folder graduation bar reconciled with single-folder findings that other analyses still routed to graduation?
What is the current state of PROGRESS.md and the recommended folder order — which folders are done?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — the file is titled as a methodology for folder analysis and delivers golden rules, workflow, sampling recipes, diff/graduation discipline, folder order, and open questions.
intention_signals: The author appears to want every analysis session to produce comparable, universal design grammar rather than deck-specific observations, so the design system is built only from rules proven across multiple folders and can be applied to any surface or subject.
novelty: Codifying design auditing as a reproducible measured protocol with explicit sampling tolerances, a >=2-folder graduation gate, and contradiction-prioritisation is distinctive compared with informal design review.
contribution: Contributes the analysis methodology itself: a content-agnostic, ratio-relative, pixel-sampling protocol; a confirm/new/generalise/contradict diff vocabulary; and a >=2-folder graduation discipline with a recalibrate->primitives->components->templates order that governs how findings enter the design system.
summary_for_embedding: An interpretive ledger record of a reproducible methodology for analysing ingested deck folders into universal design grammar via content-agnostic ratio-relative pixel sampling, confirm/new/generalise/contradict diff tagging, and a >=2-folder confirmation gate before graduation into the design system.
intention_for_embedding: To document a consistent, overfitting-resistant folder-analysis protocol so the design system is built only from surface-independent, subject-independent rules confirmed across multiple folders.
